exercises.sentence: Cada mañana, yo ____ ejercicio en el parque.
exercises.translation: Every morning, I do exercise in the park.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ mi tarea antes de ver la televisión.
exercises.translation: I do my homework before watching television.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ el desayuno para toda mi familia.
exercises.translation: I make breakfast for my whole family.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ____ tú tanto ruido en tu cuarto?
exercises.translation: Why are you making so much noise in your room?

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú las maletas para el viaje mañana?
exercises.translation: Are you packing the suitcases for the trip tomorrow?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ muchas preguntas interesantes en clase.
exercises.translation: You ask many interesting questions in class.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo ____ una tarta deliciosa para mi mamá.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I made a delicious cake for my mom.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ una llamada importante esta tarde.
exercises.translation: I made an important call this afternoon.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ todo lo posible para ayudar a mi amigo.
exercises.translation: I did everything possible to help my friend.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú la cama esta mañana antes de salir?
exercises.translation: Did you make the bed this morning before leaving?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ un trabajo excelente en el proyecto final.
exercises.translation: You did an excellent job on the final project.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ____ tú durante tus vacaciones en España?
exercises.translation: What did you do during your vacation in Spain?

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo siempre ____ castillos de arena.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I always made sandcastles.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ mis deberes mientras escuchaba música clásica.
exercises.translation: I used to do my homework while I listened to classical music.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ deporte todos los días cuando vivía en México.
exercises.translation: I did sports every day when I lived in Mexico.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú mucha gimnasia cuando estabas en la escuela?
exercises.translation: Did you do a lot of gymnastics when you were in school?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ las compras del supermercado cada sábado.
exercises.translation: You used to do the supermarket shopping every Saturday.

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ muecas graciosas para hacerme reír.
exercises.translation: You used to make funny faces to make me laugh.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ un viaje por el mundo si tuviera dinero.
exercises.translation: I would take a trip around the world if I had money.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ cualquier cosa por mi mejor amigo.
exercises.translation: I would do anything for my best friend.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ más ejercicio si tuviera más tiempo libre.
exercises.translation: I would do more exercise if I had more free time.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú un cambio en tu carrera profesional?
exercises.translation: Would you make a change in your professional career?

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú una fiesta si fuera tu cumpleaños hoy?
exercises.translation: Would you have a party if it were your birthday today?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ bien en estudiar un poco más cada día.
exercises.translation: You would do well to study a little more each day.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo ____ el pastel de chocolate para la fiesta.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will make the chocolate cake for the party.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ las reservaciones del hotel esta misma tarde.
exercises.translation: I will make the hotel reservations this very afternoon.

exercises.sentence: Yo ____ todo lo que pueda para solucionar este problema.
exercises.translation: I will do everything I can to solve this problem.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú la cena esta noche o salimos a comer?
exercises.translation: Will you make dinner tonight or shall we go out to eat?

exercises.sentence: Tú ____ muchos amigos en tu nuevo curso de español.
exercises.translation: You will make many friends in your new Spanish course.

exercises.sentence: ¿____ tú las maletas antes de ir al aeropuerto?
exercises.translation: Will you pack the suitcases before going to the airport?
